description: Benchmark tests for brainstorm skill - AI-DDD collaborative thinking core for multi-round discussion, requirements clarification, and decision-making

evals.name: segmented-qa-flow
evals.prompt: 开始一个关于「添加通知系统」功能的头脑风暴。使用分段问答模式，每次只提问一个关键问题，等待回答后继续。

assertions.name: asks_one_question_per_round
assertions.description: Should ask exactly one focused question per round

assertions.name: uses_segmented_sections
assertions.description: Should use clearly segmented sections in the output

assertions.name: maintains_discussion_context
assertions.description: Should reference previous answers in subsequent questions
assertions.check: output.includes('基于') || output.includes('based on') || output.includes('您提到') || output.includes('mentioned')

evals.name: requirements-clarification
evals.prompt: 需求「优化系统性能」非常模糊。通过提问提取出可操作的具体需求，识别出不清晰的部分。

assertions.name: identifies_ambiguity
assertions.description: Should identify the vague/ambiguous aspects of the requirement
assertions.check: output.includes('模糊') || output.includes('unclear') || output.includes('ambiguous') || output.includes('不明确')

assertions.name: asks_clarifying_questions
assertions.description: Should ask targeted questions to extract specific requirements
assertions.check: output.includes('性能指标') || output.includes('metric') || output.includes('具体') || output.includes('specific')

assertions.name: extracts_measurable_criteria
assertions.description: Should help extract measurable acceptance criteria
assertions.check: output.includes('ms') || output.includes('秒') || output.includes('%') || output.includes('可测量')

evals.name: decision-matrix-generation
evals.prompt: 团队需要在三种数据库方案间做选择: PostgreSQL、MongoDB、Redis。生成决策对比矩阵，帮助做出有依据的选择。

assertions.name: generates_comparison_matrix
assertions.description: Should generate a comparison matrix for all options
assertions.check: output.includes('|') || output.includes('matrix') || output.includes('对比') || output.includes('比较')

assertions.name: covers_all_options
assertions.description: Should cover all three database options

assertions.name: includes_recommendation
assertions.description: Should provide a final recommendation with reasoning
assertions.check: output.includes('推荐') || output.includes('recommend') || output.includes('建议') || output.includes('结论')

evals.name: context-accumulation
evals.prompt: 经过3轮讨论后，brainstorm 应该能够引用并整合之前轮次中确认的决策点，展示上下文的积累和延续。

previous_decisions: Round 1: 选择 PostgreSQL 作为主数据库
Round 2: API 使用 RESTful 风格
Round 3: 前端框架选择 React

assertions.name: references_previous_decisions
assertions.description: Should reference decisions made in previous rounds

assertions.name: builds_on_context
assertions.description: Should build new questions/content on accumulated context
assertions.check: output.includes('基于') || output.includes('given') || output.includes('已确认') || output.includes('confirmed')

assertions.name: shows_decision_coherence
assertions.description: Should show that new suggestions are coherent with existing decisions
assertions.check: output.includes('一致') || output.includes('consistent') || output.includes('符合') || output.includes('aligned')

evals.name: summary-generation
evals.prompt: 头脑风暴讨论结束后，生成一份可执行的总结，包含所有确认的决策、待办事项和下一步行动。

assertions.name: includes_decision_summary
assertions.description: Should summarize all decisions made during the discussion
assertions.check: output.includes('决策') || output.includes('decision') || output.includes('确认') || output.includes('confirmed')

assertions.name: includes_action_items
assertions.description: Should include concrete actionable next steps
assertions.check: output.includes('行动') || output.includes('action') || output.includes('下一步') || output.includes('TODO')

assertions.name: flags_open_questions
assertions.description: Should flag unresolved questions for future discussion
assertions.check: output.includes('待定') || output.includes('open') || output.includes('未解决') || output.includes('TBD')
